text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are on Grass Wonder and Special Week
as the Arima Kinen finally gets underway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder expresses her appreciation and
respect for all the Umamusume running, but
declares that she won't allow any of them to take
her lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then walks to the arena for today's
monumental race.
